title: hieracium angustatum subsp. orsense
intro: Hieracium angustatum subsp. orsense, also known as the or-sense hawkweed or hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed family, characterized by its narrow leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Hieracium angustatum subsp. orsense include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible role in supporting the immune system and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding them into a powder for use in capsules or tinctures.
